ranu.name: Ranu
ranu.message: Some people feel like family the moment they arrive — and Dada's silver year simply isn't complete without you in it.

priya.name: Priya
priya.message: Some people feel like family the moment they arrive. Dada's silver year simply isn't complete unless you're standing right beside him.

khyati.name: Khyati
khyati.message: Twenty-five years, and the stories with you in them are still his favourite ones to tell. Come write the next chapter.

adeena.name: Adeena
adeena.message: From the small moments to the big ones, you've been part of the story. Come celebrate twenty-five years with us.

tibra.name: Tibra
tibra.message: Dada's greatest fortune is the people beside him — and you're one of them. We'd be honoured to have you there.

kriti.name: Kriti
kriti.message: Twenty-five years, and the best chapters all have you in them. Let's add another.

raji.name: Raji
raji.message: Twenty-five years, and the stories with you in them are still his favourite ones to tell. Come write the next chapter.

kelp.name: Kelp
kelp.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.
